item.title: Item 1: GUID and Published
item.description: This item has a GUID and a published date.
item.author: author1@example.com

item.title: Item 2: No GUID, Link only
item.description: This item has no GUID, but has a link and a published date.

item.title: Item 3: Updated only
item.description: This item has no pubDate, but has an updated date (represented as pubDate in RSS 2.0 often, but let's assume it might be missing).
